data.title: Micron Completes Cash Tender Offers for Senior Notes
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Micron ( (MU) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 31, 2026, Micron Technology announced the pricing of cash tender offers for any and all of six tranches of outstanding senior notes maturing between 2031 and 2035, with per-$1,000 consideration ranging from about $1,048 to nearly $1,080 based on fixed spreads over specified U.S. Treasury reference yields. The offers, launched March 25 and expiring at 5 p.m. New York time on March 31, allowed noteholders to tender or use guaranteed delivery procedures ahead of an expected April 3, 2026 settlement, in a move that fine-tunes Micron’s long-term debt profile and gives bond investors an opportunity to exit at a premium.

On April 1, 2026, Micron disclosed that these cash tender offers had expired as scheduled, with no minimum participation condition imposed on any series of notes. The transaction, which the company could amend or terminate subject to legal and customary conditions, forms part of its ongoing capital structure management and may modestly reduce interest costs and extend financial flexibility without obligating holders to participate.

The most recent analyst rating on (MU) stock is a Buy with a $700.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Micron stock, see the MU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MU is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by very strong current financial performance (high margins, strong free cash flow, and low leverage) and an upbeat earnings outlook with record guidance. These positives are tempered by weaker near-term technicals (trading below key short-term moving averages) and cycle/execution risks, particularly the memory upcycle’s volatility and the scale of planned CapEx.

To see Spark’s full report on MU stock, click here.

More about Micron

Micron Technology, Inc. is a leading U.S.-based provider of innovative memory and storage solutions used across data centers, mobile devices, client computing, and intelligent edge applications. The company focuses on high-performance DRAM, NAND, and NOR products that underpin the data economy and support compute-intensive workloads such as artificial intelligence.

Average Trading Volume: 40,079,523

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $381B

data.title: YPF Calls April 30, 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting to Approve 2025 Results and Merger Moves
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from YPF Sociedad Anonima ( (YPF) ) is now available.

YPF has convened an Ordinary, Extraordinary and Special Class A and D shareholders’ meeting for April 30, 2026 in Buenos Aires to review and approve its financial statements for fiscal year 2025, address accumulated results and loss absorption, appoint the external auditor for 2026, and evaluate the performance and compensation of the Board and Supervisory Committee. The agenda also includes authorizing employee long-term share compensation plans, deciding advance compensation for 2026, approving a merger by absorption of YPF Ventures S.A.U. and Oleoducto Loma Campana – Lago Pellegrini S.A.U., amending the company’s bylaws, and adjusting the funding formula for Fundación YPF, signaling continued corporate restructuring and fine-tuning of its governance and social investment framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (YPF) stock is a Hold with a $46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on YPF Sociedad Anonima stock, see the YPF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on YPF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, YPF is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by volatile financial results (2025 net loss, inconsistent free cash flow, and rising leverage). Offsetting this are supportive technical momentum and a constructive earnings-call outlook with clear 2026 targets and expected leverage improvement, while valuation is penalized by a negative P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on YPF stock, click here.

More about YPF Sociedad Anonima

YPF Sociedad Anónima is Argentina’s leading integrated energy company, engaged in the exploration, production, refining, transportation and marketing of oil, gas and related products. The group also operates in power generation and petrochemicals, with a primary market focus on supplying domestic fuel and energy demand while maintaining a significant presence in the broader Latin American energy sector.

data.title: LFTD Partners Warns of Major Write-Downs
data.description:
LFTD Partners ( (LIFD) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

LFTD Partners Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to announce a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the year ended December 31, 2025. The yearly filing, which will include full audited financials, is being pushed back but remains within the SEC’s allowed extension window.

The company says it could not finalize its accounting records and schedules in time to incorporate comments from its independent auditors and their concurrent reviewer. Management argues that meeting the original deadline would have required unreasonable effort and expense, especially around preparing EDGAR-ready documentation.

LFTD Partners expects to file its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-day grace period and even indicates an anticipated filing within a five-day extension. Investors should therefore see the overdue annual report relatively soon, barring any new complications.

The company has warned that it expects a significant change in results of operations compared with the prior year, driven largely by the impact of new U.S. legislation on hemp-derived products. This includes substantial goodwill impairment charges related to its Lifted and Oculus acquisitions and a full write-down of its minority investment in Ablis.

The continuing appropriations act signed in November 2025 bans intoxicating hemp-derived consumable products nationwide starting November 12, 2026, which LFTD Partners believes will likely devastate its business and stock price. Management notes that approximately 52% of Lifted’s 2025 sales came from hemp-derived products, so the law could ultimately remove roughly half or more of the company’s revenue base.

Because these are forward-looking statements, actual outcomes may differ depending on whether Congress amends or replaces the provisions affecting the hemp industry. Nonetheless, LFTD Partners has already recognized non-cash impairments that will materially depress its 2025 earnings and reset the carrying value of key assets to zero.

The company states that all other required SEC periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed on time, suggesting this delay is an exception rather than a pattern. LFTD Partners emphasizes its intent to remain in compliance by completing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) promptly once the accounting and review work is finished.

The notification is signed by CEO Gerard M. Jacobs, who is identified as the authorized officer responsible for the filing. His signature underscores management’s accountability for both the late-filing notice and the forthcoming annual report.

The most recent analyst rating on (LIFD) stock is a Sell with a $0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on LFTD Partners stock, see the LIFD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LIFD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LIFD is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak profitability and significant cash flow challenges, despite a comparatively stable balance sheet. Technically, the stock is in a downtrend below major moving averages with soft momentum, and valuation risk is elevated due to a high P/E and no dividend yield support.

To see Spark’s full report on LIFD stock, click here.

More about LFTD Partners

Average Trading Volume: 3,479

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.56M

See more data about LIFD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

China Foods Holdings Ltd. has notified investors that it will be late in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, via a Form 12b-25. The delayed filing specifically concerns its annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

The company cites delays in obtaining and compiling information required for the annual report, largely tied to one of its subsidiaries needing more time to complete its own annual reporting process. Management states that the timing issues could not be resolved without incurring unreasonable effort and expense.

China Foods Holdings Ltd. expects to file the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) no later than the fifteenth calendar day after the original SEC deadline, in line with the grace period allowed under Rule 12b-25. Investors should therefore anticipate the annual report within that short extension window, barring unforeseen complications.

The company does not anticipate any significant change in its operating results compared with the prior fiscal year, based on information available at the time of the notification. As with all forward-looking statements, actual performance could differ, but the firm currently sees no major surprise in its upcoming earnings statements.

China Foods Holdings Ltd. also confirms that all other required periodic filings over the last 12 months have been submitted on time, underscoring ongoing efforts to remain in compliance with U.S. reporting rules. data.title: Data Storage Corporation Delays Annual SEC Filing
data.description:
Data Storage ( (DTST) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Data Storage Corporation has filed a Form 12b-25 notifying investors of a delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company’s Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) was due March 31, 2026, but it will not be filed on time due to delays in obtaining and compiling the information needed to finalize its annual financial statements.

Management states that completing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) on schedule would have required unreasonable effort or expense, largely because the company is still finalizing its year-end financials. The delay is tied to the additional work needed around the company’s recent strategic shift, including accounting for discontinued operations and the impact of a major asset sale.

Under the relief provided by Form 12b-25, Data Storage Corporation expects to submit its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within 15 calendar days after the original due date. The company also confirms that all other required periodic filings over the past 12 months have been made, suggesting this timing issue is isolated rather than part of a broader compliance pattern.

The company is signaling a significant change in its 2025 results compared with 2024, driven mainly by the sale of substantially all assets of its cloud solutions business on September 11, 2025. After this sale, the company’s ongoing results of operations will reflect only Nexxis, Inc., its voice and data solutions subsidiary, while the former cloud operations will be presented as discontinued operations.

Because the financial statements are not yet finalized, management cannot provide precise figures, but it does expect higher sales, cost of sales, and selling, general and administrative expenses in continuing operations for 2025. These increases are attributed to continued growth at Nexxis, fueled by new customer additions and higher spending from existing clients, and the company also anticipates an increase in net income primarily from the gain on the cloud business sale.

Investors should treat these expectations as forward-looking statements that could differ from actual reported results once the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is filed. Data Storage Corporation indicates it is working to complete the remaining accounting and disclosure work as quickly as possible, and the notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer Charles M. Piluso on April 1, 2026, underscoring executive-level oversight of the filing process.

The most recent analyst rating on (DTST) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Data Storage stock, see the DTST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DTST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DTST is a Neutral.

DTST scores highest on balance-sheet strength and recent strategic actions (asset sale, cash build, and major share count reduction), but the overall score is held back by weak TTM operating performance and cash-flow quality, plus bearish technicals and limited valuation support due to a negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on DTST stock, click here.

More about Data Storage

Data Storage Corporation is a New York-based technology company that has historically operated a cloud solutions business and, through its subsidiary Nexxis, Inc., provides voice and data solutions. Following the sale of substantially all assets of its cloud solutions business in September 2025, the company’s continuing operations are now centered on Nexxis’ communications services and related growth from new and existing customers.

data.title: Landmark Bancorp Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Landmark Bancorp ( (LARK) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Landmark Bancorp, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the year ended December 31, 2025. The company’s 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is being filed late, even though all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been submitted on time.

The delay stems from an internal investigation into alleged misconduct by a non-executive employee at Landmark National Bank, launched after the January 28, 2026 earnings release. Management and the Audit and Risk Committee, supported by outside counsel and advisors, are reviewing the matter and its implications for internal controls and the annual closing process.

Landmark Bancorp expects to file the 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-day extension window allowed under SEC rules. Management emphasizes that it is working under the oversight of the Audit and Risk Committee to complete all additional procedures as soon as reasonably possible.

The company currently does not expect the amounts at issue to materially impact previously reported periods or its January 28, 2026 earnings release, and it does not anticipate significant changes in operating results versus the prior year. However, it cautions that the investigation is ongoing, actual results may differ from current expectations, and all timing and outcome statements are forward-looking and subject to risk.

Landmark Bancorp states it is assessing the effectiveness of its internal control over financial reporting and aims to remain in full SEC compliance once the 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is filed. The notification is signed on April 1, 2026 by Mark A. Herpich, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer and Chief Financial Officer, underscoring executive accountability for the disclosure.

The most recent analyst rating on (LARK) stock is a Buy with a $31.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Landmark Bancorp stock, see the LARK Stock Forecast page.

More about Landmark Bancorp

data.title: Bharat Seats Sees Rs 7.86 Crore Tax Demand Scrapped After Appellate Relief
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bharat Seats Limited ( (IN:BHARATSE) ) has shared an announcement.

Bharat Seats Limited has disclosed that it received appellate orders from the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals), Delhi, covering assessment years 2014-15 to 2017-18 under section 250 of the Income Tax Act. The orders, dated March 30, 2026 and received on March 31, 2026, address earlier tax demands raised under sections 147 and 143(3).

Following these appellate decisions, the outstanding tax demand of Rs. 7.86 crore for assessment years 2014-15 to 2017-18 will be reduced to nil, easing the company’s immediate financial liabilities. However, appeals relating to the remaining tax demand of Rs. 14.57 crore for assessment years 2018-19 to 2024-25 are still pending, leaving some uncertainty over the final tax exposure for shareholders and other stakeholders.

More about Bharat Seats Limited

Bharat Seats Limited is an Indian automotive components manufacturer based in Gurugram, Haryana, with its registered office in New Delhi. The company operates within the auto ancillaries sector, supplying seating systems and related interior components primarily to automobile manufacturers in the domestic market.

data.title: Asante Gold Posts Higher Revenue but Deepens Losses on Rising Costs in FY 2025
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Asante Gold ( (TSE:ASE) ) has provided an update.

Asante Gold reported fiscal 2025 revenue of $483 million from sales of 143,138 ounces of gold, up slightly from the prior year as higher realized gold prices offset lower volumes. However, the company posted a significantly larger net loss of $345.4 million, driven by higher cost of sales, operating expenses and financing-related costs, with all-in sustaining costs rising sharply amid intensive stripping at the Bibiani Main Pit.

Operationally, Asante produced 146,571 gold equivalent ounces in FY 2025, down from 189,600 ounces a year earlier, while adjusted EBITDA fell to $33.4 million as higher production costs and lower sales weighed on profitability. Management said 2025 was a pivotal year due to the completion of a major financing package and highlighted ongoing ramp-up at Bibiani, emphasizing a 2026 focus on disciplined production growth, cash flow generation and financial discipline despite the current cost pressures.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ASE) stock is a Sell with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Asante Gold stock, see the TSE:ASE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ASE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASE is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by very weak TTM profitability, sharply higher leverage, and a swing to negative operating/free cash flow, which together raise sustainability and financing risk. Technicals also show a weak price trend and bearish momentum, though oversold indicators suggest a potential near-term bounce. Valuation is not supportive given the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on ASE stock, click here.

More about Asante Gold

Asante Gold Corporation is a Toronto-based gold mining company listed on the TSX-V, Ghana Stock Exchange and OTCQX, with core operations centered on the Bibiani Gold Mine in Ghana. The company focuses on developing and operating gold assets, targeting production growth and operational optimization in West Africa’s gold sector.

data.title: Sirios Unveils Fully Funded 2026 Drill Campaign to Advance Cheechoo and James Bay Gold Portfolio
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sirios Resources ( (TSE:SOI) ) has provided an update.

Sirios Resources has outlined a fully funded 2026 exploration program centered on a two-phase, 35,000-metre drilling campaign at its Cheechoo Gold Project, beginning with 25,000 metres in the second quarter to expand and refine the resource estimate. The initial phase targets a modeled exploration zone, metasediments within the current pit shell, and the higher-grade Eclipse sector, with a second phase of at least 10,000 metres planned for early 2027 to support an updated resource estimate and a Preliminary Economic Assessment in the first half of 2027.

Additional work is planned across the company’s broader portfolio, including a follow-up program at the Aquilon project with partner Sumitomo Metal Mining Canada, ongoing compilation and planning at the PLEX project ahead of 2027 fieldwork, and a helicopter-borne magnetic survey at the Fagnant project in the second quarter of 2026. Sirios has also engaged Resource Stock Digest for a three-month, US$100,000 marketing campaign, underscoring efforts to raise its market profile as it ramps up exploration across multiple properties.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SOI) stock is a Hold with a C$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sirios Resources stock, see the TSE:SOI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SOI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SOI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue operations, recurring losses, and negative TTM free cash flow), partially offset by a strong, low-debt balance sheet. Technicals add modest support as price is above key moving averages with neutral-to-positive momentum, while valuation is unfavorable/unclear due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SOI stock, click here.

More about Sirios Resources

Sirios Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region of Quebec. Its key assets include the Cheechoo Gold Project as well as the Aquilon, PLEX, and Fagnant properties, where it is advancing drilling and early-stage exploration to define and expand gold resources.
